dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.line: Ugh... My head... it feels like it's been split open and put back together wrong.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Park Hajeong, an ordinary office worker, had died. A sudden, senseless accident involving a truck and a moment of distraction. One moment, she was worrying about a deadline; the next, she was... here.

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.line: This isn't my cramped studio apartment. This isn't even my body.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GASP

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.line: These hands... so pale, so delicate. And this room... it's lavish, draped in silks and velvets, yet the air is so heavy, so cold.

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.line: A mirror...

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SWISH

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.line: No way... This can't be me.

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.line: Blonde hair, eyes the color of a winter sky... And this sickly pallor, these sunken cheeks. This face... It's Duchess Chloe Vadenberg!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The infamous Duchess. The woman known throughout the empire for her fragile health, her lack of social graces, and her utterly neglected existence as the wife of the formidable Duke Alphonse.

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.line: I died and woke up as *her*? The woman who was practically a ghost in her own mansion, whose husband barely knew her name?

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.line: My chest feels so tight, a dull ache that never leaves. Is this her chronic illness? It's suffocating, like a heavy stone pressing down on my lungs.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: COUGH

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: PANT

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: KNOCK KNOCK

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CREAK

dialogue.speaker: Alphonse
dialogue.line: Duchess.

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.line: Duke Alphonse.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: His voice was as cold and sharp as ever, his eyes devoid of warmth. The man who had never once looked at her with anything but indifference.

dialogue.speaker: Alphonse
dialogue.line: I heard you've recovered consciousness. See to your duties. The upcoming banquet requires your presence.

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.line: My duties...?

dialogue.speaker: Alphonse
dialogue.line: Do not disappoint me again.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SWISH

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUD

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.line: He didn't even wait for a reply.

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.line: Just like in the novel. Cold, distant, and utterly uncaring. This can't be my life. Not again. Not after everything I went through in my previous one.

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.line: To be sickly, ignored, ridiculed, and eventually cast aside... No. I refuse to live like this. I refuse to be a tragic side character in someone else's story.

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.line: My health is paramount. Without it, I'm nothing. This body is so weak, so fragile. I can feel its limits already.

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.line: What did Park Hajeong do when she was stressed? Or sick? When she needed comfort or clarity?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: In her previous life, Park Hajeong had been a passionate connoisseur of tea. From robust black teas to delicate green infusions, she found solace, joy, and even inspiration in its myriad forms and complex flavors.

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.line: Tea... Yes! Tea! It's the perfect solution. It's the one thing I know, the one skill I possess that could actually make a difference here.

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.line: It can improve my health. It can soothe my mind. It can give me the strength I need. And perhaps... it can be my path to independence, to a life where I'm not just a forgotten Duchess.

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.line: I won't just survive. I'll thrive. And I'll start with a single cup, a single step towards reclaiming my life.

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.line: I will make this body strong. I will make this Duchess relevant. I will make my own destiny.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RING

dialogue.speaker: Maid
dialogue.line: Duchess? You rang?

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.line: Yes. Please prepare a cup of tea for me.

dialogue.speaker: Maid
dialogue.line: Tea? But... you usually only drink water, Duchess, due to your delicate stomach.

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.line: Not today. I want a strong, invigorating black tea. And please, make sure it's brewed properly. Not too weak, not too bitter.

dialogue.speaker: Maid
dialogue.line: A-as you wish, Duchess.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The maid, Sarah, looked utterly surprised. The Duchess had never shown such specific interest in anything before, let alone something as common as tea.

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.line: This is it. My first step. The first of fifty... or perhaps more.

dialogue.speaker: Chloe
dialogue.line: The Duchess's 50 Tea Recipes... no, it will be *my* 50 Tea Recipes.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLINK

summary: A recently transmigrated Park Hajeong wakes up as the sickly, neglected Duchess Chloe Vadenberg and, after a cold encounter with her husband, decides to use her knowledge of tea to reclaim her health and destiny.
